_source: BSR real (Manage Inventory). Amazon's Choice badge confirmed sustained. PPC keyword status estimated (Campaign Manager unavailable). Session data real (Business Reports).

amazon_choice_badge.bsr_impact: BSR improved 23,994 positions in 2 days (105,671 → 81,677) with only 1 sale (Mallory Apr 18). Badge is sustaining BSR even on 0-sale days by driving sessions.
amazon_choice_badge.session_impact_confirmed: 397 sessions in 7-day window (Business Reports, real) vs ~72 estimated pre-badge = 5.5x session volume increase. Traffic surge ongoing.
_maintenance_rules: Do NOT change title — EXP-019 title earned the badge. Stability is critical.
Keep FBA in stock — 374 units available.
Maintain 4.5+ star rating — request reviews urgently.
Keep price at $49.99 — do not raise while badge is active.
Keep PPC running — ad activity signals active listing management to Amazon.

tracked_keywords._notes: Amazon's Choice badge likely for THIS keyword (18,100 SV, highest volume we're indexed for). Broad match at high SV is generating irrelevant clicks. Recommend reducing bid 15% — badge doing organic work. Monitor ACoS.

tracked_keywords.keyword: cat water fountain stainless steel wireless
tracked_keywords.ppc_status: active — BID INCREASED by Victor Apr 17
tracked_keywords._notes: Best performing keyword. Bid increase Apr 17 was correct. With Amazon's Choice badge + stainless steel title match, this should continue to outperform. ACoS estimated down to ~28% from 30.8%. Keep bidding aggressively.

tracked_keywords.keyword: wireless stainless steel pet water fountain
tracked_keywords.ppc_status: SHOULD BE PAUSED — EXP-024 decision date was Apr 18
tracked_keywords._notes: 4+ zero-conversion weeks. Decision date Apr 18 was yesterday. If Victor didn't pause, do it immediately. Confirmed waste: $14/week for no return.
Budget cut to $10/day by Victor Apr 17. Auto campaign now constrained. Monitor conversion rate at this budget. If 0 conversions by Apr 24, pause fully (saves $70/week).
7,200 SV. Amazon's Choice badge will win exact match placement. Add as exact match at $1.30 bid. This was Priority #1 new keyword on Apr 17 — still not added. Act now.
Add as phrase match after search term report review. $0.90 bid starting point.
Bundle ASIN B0GMDM6CG2 has 43% gross margin. No PPC. Launch dedicated bundle campaign — exact match, $0.80-1.00 bid. 1 bundle/week = $27.85 gross profit.

bsr_tracker._bsr_data_source: REAL — Manage Inventory, scraped ~10:42 PM PDT Apr 19
bsr_tracker.bsr_trend: ACCELERATING — 2-day improvement of 23,994 positions with only 1 sale
bsr_tracker.bsr_note: 81,677 — sub-82K for first time ever. 2-day improvement of 23,994 driven by Mallory Apr 18 + Amazon's Choice badge organic signal. BSR improved even on 0-sale Apr 19 — badge is acting as a BSR floor. Sub-80K BSR is now just 1-2 sales away.

sessions_outlook._sessions_source: real — Business Reports Detail Page by Child Item
sessions_outlook.projected_cvr_recovery: Currently 1.07% (traffic surge suppressing CVR). Expected to recover to 3-4% as traffic normalizes over 2-4 weeks.
sessions_outlook._note: At 57 sessions/day and 3% CVR = 1.71 units/day = ~12 units/week = ~$600/week revenue. This is the target state when traffic normalizes.

keyword_summary.wow_note: BSR sub-82K (new record). 397 sessions in 7 days (5.7x pre-badge). Amazon's Choice badge sustained day 2. Critical next steps: (1) Pull search term report, (2) Pause EXP-024 waste, (3) Add 'battery operated cat fountain' exact match, (4) Harvest converting terms from search term report.
